Hearing On Petition To Approve Minors Compromise - Minor Addison Roesling
Off Calendar Dec-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 610, Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Ernest Arndt. Matter Not Reported.

The matter was sent to Department 610 from Department 514 for hearing.

Gregory Brock, Esq. for Petitioner(s): Sarah Stier, as guardian ad litem for and with: Addison Roesling, a minor Claimant. R. Randy Wertz, Esq. appearing for the defendant.
The Court takes oral evidence from attorneys on both sides.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Attorney's fees: $10,177.00
Medical expenses total $4,294.00
A net balance of $30,529.00

to the trustee of the Addison Roesling Special Needs Trust, as described in Attachment 12, which is made part of this order.

Order signed by Judge Curtis Karnow.

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of The Minor - Addison Roesling.
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Continued To Apr-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Greg Brock, Esq. and Gabriel Bellman, Esq. appeared with petitioner Sarah Stier, the Guardian ad Litem for the minor Addison Roesling.
Ms. Stier, who appeared telephonically, was placed under oath and examined.

The Court requires further information from petitioner in order to proceed with today's hearing. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to April 29, 2010 @ 11:00 a.m. in Department 218. Ms. Stier may appear telephonically at the next calling of the case.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Continued To Apr-20-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of The Minor - Addison Roesling.
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Continued To Apr-06-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the petition to approve the compromise of a disputed claim of the minor, Addison roesling.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Greg Brock, Esq. and Gabriel L. Bellman, Esq. appeared with petitioner Sarah Stier, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Addison Roesling, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
James Roseling, the minor's father, was also present at today's hearing.

By Order of the Court, this matter is continued to April 6, 2010 @ 11:00 a.m. in Department 218 in order to allow petitioner and her counsel to engage in further discussions regarding the terms of the proposed compromise.

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of The Disputed Claims Of Three Minors.
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claims of Three Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Gregory P. Brock, Esq. and Gabriel Bellman, Esq. appeared with petitioner Lisa Cardone, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for the minors Pretty Jane Sims and Strong Claire Sims, who were also present at today's hearing.
Neither petitioner Sarah Stier, nor the minor Addison Roesling, were present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

As to Pretty Jane Sims:

Settlement Amount - $90,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $21,427.00.
Medical Expenses - $4,294.00.
Costs - $2.00.

The net balance of $67,277.00 shall to be invested in a single-premium deferred annuity as described in Attachment 7c(2)(b) of the Order Approving the Compromise.

As to Strong Claire Sims:

Settlement Amount - $90,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $21,427.00.
Medical Expenses - $4,294.00.
Costs - $4.00.

The net balance of $67,275.00 shall to be invested in a single-premium deferred annuity as described in Attachment 7c(2)(b) of the Order Approving the Compromise.

Orders Approving the Compromises of the Disputed Claims of the Minors were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is continued to March 4, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of the Disputed Claim of the minor, Addison Roesling.
